name: /cost-report --window=weekly aggregates entries from cost-rollup/weekly/<YYYY-Www>.json per H-12
command: mkdir -p rollup/weekly && printf '%s' '{"entries":[{"profile":"react","tokens_in":500,"tokens_out":250,"invocations":5}]}' > rollup/weekly/2026-W21.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cost-report.sh" --window=weekly --rollup-dir=rollup --by=profile 2>out.txt && grep -q 'window=weekly' out.txt && grep -q 'react' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
